usefulness_evaluation.narrative: All six companion-mode informational queries were answered without any itinerary tool calls. The AI correctly distinguished info queries from modification requests. Itinerary item count remained at 13 throughout (N_BEFORE=13, N_AFTER=13). Responses were concise (95-146 words), practical, and phone-friendly. The PR #201 guardrail is working as intended — the real create_itinerary_items and delete_itinerary_items tools are available but the AI chose not to call them on purely informational queries, including the previously problematic 'recommend something fun tonight' trigger.
